sql.if: AND ( CAST(o.id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT o.id AS orderId, CONCAT('ORD-', LPAD(o.id, 8, '0')) AS orderNumber, o.status AS status, o.total_amount AS totalAmount, COALESCE(u.name, g.name, '(알 수 없음)') AS buyerName, COALESCE(u.phone, g.phone, '') AS buyerPhone, o.paid_at AS paidAt, o.approval_deadline_at AS approvalDeadlineAt, o.created_at AS createdAt FROM orders o INNER JOIN ( SELECT o.id FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN guests g ON o.guest_id = g.id
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset} ) sub ON o.id = sub.id LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN guests g ON o.guest_id = g.id ORDER BY o.created_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN guests g ON o.guest_id = g.id
